name: feedback
description: Pause the mission and ask the human user a question or request approval before continuing. Use when you need a decision, confirmation, or clarification that only the user can provide — for example: 'The UI dashboard is ready, does the layout look correct?' or 'I found two conflicting prices — which one should I use?'. The mission will automatically resume once the user responds.

question.description: The question or decision you want the user to answer before work continues. Be specific and concise.

context.description: Optional summary of what was accomplished so far, to give the user enough context to answer the question.
